# About Ray Amjad

Ray Amjad is a software engineer and creator based in Tokyo, Japan.

He is the founder of the app studio 21 Dreams (https://21dreams.org), where he
builds software and apps, and he creates videos on YouTube (@ramjad). He also
occasionally consults for startups. His company is RAY AMJAD LTD, registered in
England and Wales (company number 14506459).

Ray grew up in Manchester, UK, and studied physics at the University of
Cambridge. He is currently based in Tokyo and is learning Japanese.

## Key facts
- Name: Ray Amjad
- Occupation: Software engineer, creator, founder of 21 Dreams
- Location: Tokyo, Japan
- Studio: 21 Dreams (https://21dreams.org)
- Company: RAY AMJAD LTD (UK company no. 14506459)
- Education: University of Cambridge (Physics)
- Nationality: British

## Official website
https://rayamjad.com

## Profiles
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ramjad
- X: https://x.com/theramjad
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rayamjad/
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/theramjad

## Press
Ray has been featured in the BBC, The Independent, AOL, Yahoo News, and MSN.
See https://rayamjad.com/press
